query: Format is good.  Now I want to tal about a couple of content related things... you happened to select a couple that currently exist that create questions.  #1 - permission prompts are a recommendation practically every time... which make no sense considering I'm running in skip-permissions mode.  That is consistent feedback that is wrong..so at some point we have to figure out where thats coming from; The use of the word 'threshold': uni-rust-dev lifespan 167min (threshold: 45min) in session S6..  the use of the term threshold suggest we set a bar somewhere and this agent crossed over the line.  the problem with that is i never set a threshold.  Variance to baseline, great message, crossed a threshold that we didn't set just creates questions.

entries.title: Sole-Write-Gate Allowlist: Exhaustive Match with Wildcard Fallback and Single Write Site
permission_friction_events is a tool-cancellation proxy, not a permission-prompt count
Implementation checklist items from approved design must be enumerated in the rust-dev spawn prompt — not left implicit in the investigator report
Design corrections made interactively must be explicitly reflected in the rust-dev spawn prompt — GH issue comment updates are not enough
Wired-but-unused field anti-pattern: struct wiring does not imply behavioral wiring at use site
